summary: Crypto trading platform on Internet Computer (ICP) with Motoko backend and React/TypeScript frontend. Frontend communicates directly with Binance public API for market data, analytics, and metrics. Browser-side API key management for retrieving and monitoring open positions in near real-time. UI based on Smart Money Concepts (SMC) principles from provided trading books.
architectural_notes: Frontend (React/TypeScript) handles all Binance API communication directly from the browser — no backend proxy
Binance API keys stored and used only in the browser for position retrieval; never sent to the canister
SMC analysis logic derived from user-provided trading books as knowledge base

existing_features.title: Implement a real-time market data dashboard that fetches Binance Futures USD-M ticker data (price, 24h change, volume, funding rate, open interest) via public API calls from the frontend browser, displaying data in a professional trading terminal style with dark neon theme.

Implement Smart Money Concepts (SMC) indicators on the candlestick chart and analysis panels, based on the SMC trading books provided as knowledge base. Include: Order Blocks (bullish/bearish), Fair Value Gaps (FVG), Break of Structure (BOS), Change of Character (CHoCH), liquidity zones (buy-side and sell-side liquidity), swing highs/lows, and Premium/Discount zones.

Implement classic technical indicators panel alongside the SMC analysis, including RSI (14), MACD (12/26/9), Exponential Moving Averages (EMA 20, 50, 200), Simple Moving Averages (SMA 50, 200), and Bollinger Bands (20, 2). Display computed values in a compact panel below the chart and overlay MAs and Bollinger Bands directly on the candlestick chart.

Implement browser-side Binance API Key and Secret Key authentication to retrieve the user's open futures positions and account balance. Store the API credentials securely in the browser's localStorage (never sent to the backend). Use HMAC-SHA256 signing in the browser to sign requests to the Binance private REST API endpoints for account and position data.

Implement near real-time monitoring of open Binance Futures positions with automatic polling every 5–10 seconds. Display each position with entry price, current mark price, unrealized PnL (in USDT and percentage), liquidation price, leverage, and side (Long/Short). Show visual P&L alerts when a position gains or loses more than a configurable threshold.

Apply a consistent professional trading terminal visual theme across the entire application. Use a dark background with high-contrast neon accent colors (green for bullish/profit, red for bearish/loss, amber/yellow for neutral signals). Typography should be monospace or semi-monospace for data values, with clean sans-serif for labels. Layout should follow a multi-panel trading dashboard structure.

new_feature_requests.summary: Binance public API integration for real-time market data (prices, volume, order book, candlestick charts)
Smart Money Concepts indicators: Order Blocks, Fair Value Gaps (FVG), BOS, CHoCH, liquidity zones, swing points
Classic technical indicators panel: RSI, MACD, moving averages, Bollinger Bands
Browser-side Binance API Key + Secret Key authentication for retrieving open positions
Near real-time position monitoring (polling every 5-10 seconds) with P&L visual alerts
